Title: Relates to the unlawful use of a New York driver's license or identification card
Summary: Relates to the unlawful use of a New York driver's license or identification card.
LawCode: Add §399-ss, Gen Bus L; amd §65-b, ABC L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law and the alcoholic beverage control law, in relation to the unlawful use of a New York state driver's license or identification card
